\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Header file of the class that provides auxiliary mathematical functionalities for the SIE solver. 

These include\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Lookup table management classes for complex-\/valued functions
\item Special functions (erf/erfc, exponential integral)
\item Factorials and dyadic algebra
\item Symmetry operations (translations)
\item Interpolation templates (linear, bilinear, trilinear)
\item Table generators for error-\/function lookups (text and binary) 
\end{DoxyItemize}

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{mathFunctions_8h_source}{math\+Functions.\+h}}.
